voxy.config.title: Voxy
voxy.config.general.serviceThreads.toolt: Number of threads the ServiceThreadPool can use
voxy.config.general.useSodiumBuilder.too: Uses sodium builder threads as part of voxys thread pool, can reduce stuttering and lag when moving quickly at high render distance
voxy.config.general.ingest.tooltip: Enables or disables voxies ability to convert new chunks into LoDs
voxy.config.general.showJoinMessage.tool: Show the Voxy version and credits once on the first world join, then do not repeat it
voxy.config.general.subDivisionSize.tool: Maximum size in pixels (squared) of screenspace AABB before subdiving to smaller LoDs (Smaller being higher quality)
voxy.config.general.renderDistance.toolt: Render distance of voxy in chunks
voxy.config.general.renderPressure.toolt: Controls Voxy's per-frame LOD build pressure, including top-level node processing rate and render-thread model baking budget. Lower values prioritize FPS and reduce stutter while moving; higher values make LODs catch up faster. This option is hot-reloadable.
voxy.config.general.lodBoundaryFade.tool: Uses a camera-centred circular handoff between vanilla chunks and Voxy LOD; water keeps its independent boundary. Disable this when the shader pack already provides an LOD fade, such as Photon, to avoid noise, double fading, or a shadow seam.
voxy.config.general.lodBoundaryFade.warn: ⚠ Circular LOD fade — disable for Photon-like shaders
WARNING: Disable this when the active shader pack already supplies its own LOD fade (for example Photon). Enabling both can cause noise, repeated fading, or a visible shadow boundary.
voxy.config.general.lodBoundaryFadeLengt: Width of the handoff band in blocks. Wider values change more gradually while moving, but make the dithered region wider.
voxy.config.general.lodBoundaryInset.too: Moves the outer handoff edge inward from vanilla render distance so loaded vanilla terrain remains behind the transition.
voxy.config.general.environmental_fog.to: Enables or disables voxy rendering environmental fog
voxy.config.general.ssao_mode.tooltip: The mode used for screenspace ambient occlusion (Auto attempts to pick the best option while reducing performance impact)
voxy.config.general.adaptCloudDistance.t: Enables or disables adaptive cloud distance
voxy.config.general.cloudDistance.toolti: Cloud distance in chunks, up to 128 (used when adaptive cloud distance is disabled)
voxy.config.general.fogIntensity.tooltip: Intensity of the fog, higher values make the fog thicker and reduce visibility
voxy.config.general.fogDensity.tooltip: Shapes the fog falloff curve - higher values make the transition more extreme (clear up close, ramping up sharply near the fog distance). 0 is a uniform linear fade
voxy.config.general.skyFogDistance.toolt: End distance for sky and LOD terrain fog, in chunks
voxy.config.general.fog_distance.tooltip: Scales voxy's LOD fog distance (100% = fog reaches full at the render edge). Higher = see further before the distant LOD fades to the sky colour.
voxy.config.fakesight.enabled.tooltip: Requests more chunks for Voxy. Singleplayer is capped at 32 chunks to prevent generation from freezing frame rate; higher distances still increase CPU, memory, and save load.
voxy.config.fakesight.followLod.tooltip: Automatically uses Voxy's LOD radius, capped at the vanilla protocol limit of 127 chunks. Disable to use the manual distance below.
voxy.config.fakesight.distance.tooltip: Manual request radius up to 127 chunks. High values substantially increase CPU, memory, network and world-generation load.
voxy.config.farEntities.players.tooltip: Render lightweight player snapshots beyond vanilla entity range. Multiplayer requires Voxy on the server; SeeU takes precedence when installed.
voxy.config.farEntities.vehicles.tooltip: Independently controls boats, minecarts, mounts and other entities ridden by distant players. Disabling it also stops vehicle snapshots from being sent.
voxy.config.farEntities.names.tooltip: Shows name tags above distant player proxies.
voxy.config.farEntities.animationDistanc: Only animate distant players inside this range. Set to 0 for static proxies and lower CPU cost.
voxy.config.farEntities.sharePosition.to: Allow other Voxy clients on the same server to receive your distant-player snapshot.
voxy.config.compat.sableLod.tooltip: Keep simulated contraptions (ships, vehicles) rendered out to LOD distances instead of only within vanilla render distance
voxy.config.compat.sableLodDistance.tool: How far distant contraptions stay rendered, as a percentage of voxy's render distance. 0% disables the extension
voxy.config.compat.distantTrains.tooltip: Keep Create trains (including bogey wheels) rendered beyond entity range, out to LOD distances. Requires voxy on the server
voxy.config.compat.distantTracks.tooltip: Render Create's track network beyond render distance using the tracks' real models (addon tracks like monorails included, plus bezier girders). Reads the client-synced track graph, no server support needed
Max render distance (chunks) for distant trains. Follow LOD = use voxy's LOD radius. Lower cuts GPU load; on the integrated server (singleplayer / LAN host) it also shrinks the server's pose-stream window, saving bandwidth
Max render distance (chunks) for the distant track network. Follow LOD = use voxy's LOD radius
voxy.config.compat.distantContraptions.t: Hold a static snapshot of contraptions (bearings/pistons/gantries/minecart) the player passed, or render still-loaded ones live, out in the LOD. Client-side, no server needed
voxy.config.compat.distantContraptionDis: Max render distance (chunks) for distant contraptions. Follow LOD = use voxy's LOD radius
voxy.config.compat.distantBeacons.toolti: Draw beacon beams beyond vanilla's range using Voxy's stored terrain, including chunks not loaded this session
voxy.config.compat.distantBeaconDistance: Maximum beacon-beam distance in chunks. Follow LOD uses Voxy's LOD radius
voxy.config.compat.distantKinetics.toolt: Cull placed kinetic machine moving parts (rotating shafts/gears) beyond the render distance so they stop floating over the LOD. Off = Create renders them natively (may float)
voxy.config.compat.kineticEnclosedCullin: Globally render-cull shafts that are enclosed with opaque blocks on both axis ends
voxy.config.compat.esSnowLod.tooltip: Recolor LOD terrain with Ecliptic Seasons snow cover. Applies to newly ingested chunks
voxy.config.compat.esLodAutoReload.toolt: Automatically re-import region LODs when the season changes so distant snow cover stays current
voxy.config.compat.esReloadOnSeasonChang: Rebuild the LOD renderer when the season changes so already-loaded LODs recolor immediately
voxy.join.openRepo: Click to open the GitHub repository
voxy.config.general.leafLodMode.tooltip: Controls distant leaf rendering. Fast uses opaque foliage. Balanced uses stable per-block texture rotations, culls hidden internal faces, and keeps irregular mip-aware cutouts at medium impact. Quality preserves fine cutout detail at higher GPU cost.
